evidence.scope: files=4-6 surface=schedule route plus supporting db/test helpers within one scheduling subsystem
evidence.behavior: one user-visible workflow change: schedule submission now requires a selected piece when the merged schedule context has multiple candidates
evidence.dependency: interfaces=schedule page data contract plus existing performance-piece selection helpers
evidence.uncertainty: merged performer+concert-series+year scheduling context currently centers on a primary performance row, so piece resolution needs careful adjustment
evidence.verification: checks=npm run lint,npm run build,npm run test plus targeted schedule-flow coverage
evidence.guardrails: no schema/api contract change; no new deps; localized surface; reversible with straightforward verification
